75883.subject: Data & Insights: Robinhood Chainsanity; HIP-3 Dominance
75883.body:
The Data and Insights newsletter brings the highlights of the week from The Block’s Data Dashboard

( https://www.theblock.co/data/crypto-markets/spot )

Presented by:

Nodit ( https://www.nodit.io/&utm_source=theblock&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=datashare-q3 )

Gm data enjoyers! We’re super excited to see Robinhood's successful chain launch breathe some life into memecoins and onchain activity. Our team recently published a new report titled " Grvt and the Rise of Composable Onchain Wealth ( https://www.theblock.co/post/407075/grvt-and-the-rise-of-composable-onchain-wealth )." We recommend giving it a check.

This week, we’re taking a look at Robinhood’s new blockchain and how it's impacted its native stablecoin. We’ll also look at ETFs, tweet volumes, and the adoption of HIP-3 markets. So grab a drink, take a seat, and let's dive in.

1: Enter The Green Chain

( https://www.theblock.co/data/on-chain-metrics/robinhood-chain/robinhood-chain-daily-dex-volume )

Chart via The Block's Data Dashboard

*Key Insights* provided by The Block Research

* This is a section from The Block's The Funding newsletter ( https://mc.sendgrid.com/single-sends/01616a46-7c4c-11f1-9f4a-d6c56c011750/editor/modules?moduleId=72eceb37-1c43-4eb4-9427-01835217b8f4.1.1.1 ) , where also cover venture fundings developments and topics across the broader institutional crypto space — including Wall Street, public companies, institutional products and corporate adoption.
* Robinhood Chain has seen over $2.3 billion in cumulative DEX volume in the roughly 10 days since its launch on July 1st

* Almost all this volume, roughly 97% of it, occurred from July 8 onward
* On July 7th, daily DEX volume on the chain was just $32 million. The very next day, it was $433 million.
* Transaction count also rose from 1.3 million to 6.9 million, while active accounts rose from 33K to nearly 200K in that same day.

* The catalyst for this near-instantaneous spike in activity was a post on X ( https://x.com/vladtenev/status/2074695821896065360 ) by Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev, which essentially supported memecoins on the chain.

* This caused an onchain frenzy that caused speculators and onchain capital to bridge into the chain
* One of the main beneficiaries of this was a memecoin called Cashcat, named after the mascot from Robinhood's pre-rename startup days of the same name.
* The token’s market cap rose from under $10 million before Vlad’s post to over $140 million within hours, peaking at ~$225 million, while many other smaller-cap memecoins also surged in tandem.

* Robinhood built the Arbitrum-based L2 as institutional infrastructure for tokenized real-world assets, while Uniswap served as the main DEX of the chain.

* Due to the surge in volume and activity, both the ARB and UNI tokens also rose considerably as a spillover effect.
ARB rose by over 30% from July 8th to the time of writing, while UNI rose by over 40% from July 1st.
* Total value locked

75876.subject: Projecting Priority Fees
75876.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/eaa70932-7ce4-467e-b338-a662ed575d6a/0xR_NL_Banner_Heading_Wordmark.jpg?t=1776775276)
Caption: 

Markets are opening the week under pressure as renewed tensions in the Middle East push oil higher and bring inflation risk back into focus. BTC has remained surprisingly resilient, while crypto performance is increasingly concentrated around DEXs and tokens exposed to Robinhood’s growing onchain ecosystem.

We then turn to Hyperliquid’s priority fees. The mechanism has generated $3.94M since launching in April, but adoption remains limited to a small group of traders and a handful of contested markets. By measuring the persistent taker edge available across the exchange, we estimate that write priority fees could scale from their current $15M annualized pace to between $26M and $78M as competition spreads across the order book.

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/42e942ec-f31d-4957-8722-a3ac7b121e1e/0xR_NL_Market_Update.png?t=1767631151) [Market Update]
Caption: 

Market performance was mixed over the last week, with BTC moving in tandem with risk assets and ending the week up 0.96%. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq also posted modest gains of 0.72% and 0.35% respectively, while Gold was the laggard, falling -1.86%. However, all four benchmarks have opened the week lower as geopolitical tensions once again weigh on sentiment.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/5f3bea06-6ef5-4f0c-b62e-4b87650d426a/image.png?t=1783946111)
Caption: 

Despite the conflict in the Middle East, tech equities remained resilient last week, supported by continued strength in the AI trade. SK Hynix [made](https://seekingalpha.com/news/4612798-sk-hynix-us-debut-memory-chipmaker-raises-265b-in-historic-adr-sale?message_id=wall_street_breakfast&serial=58615945_434602128570&source=email_wsb&utm_medium=email&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-9Rfgqf33Mse9zFfduQgFsdDgpxI_t6ZLjvPca3Flskhgu6HDQybMyVrE0vQnCKt490Fg8oNqUrI0_ud3ItvSsFRqvUVg&_hsmi=140531804&utm_content=140531804&utm_source=hs_email) its US market debut, raising $26.8B in the largest ever IPO by a foreign company in the US. Their shares finished their first trading day up 12.8%, though they gave back those gains on Monday, opening -15% lower. 

That optimism is now being tested. The conflict has [escalated](https://www.reuters.com/world/iran-war-live-sirens-bahrain-iran-escalates-after-more-us-strikes-2026-07-13/) with renewed exchanges between US and Iranian forces, while Iran announced the closure of the Strait of Hormuz. WTI crude has climbed 7.5% over the past week to around [$74](https://app.hyperliquid.xyz/trade), bringing inflation concerns back into focus just two weeks ahead of the Fed meetin

75867.subject: ⚔️ Korean circuit breaker triggered as US/Iran war begins again
75867.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC** $63,023 (-1.3%) | **ETH** $1,780 (-1.1%) | **SOL** $76 (-0.5%)

* [US strikes](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2076090223079969086?s=20) Iranian targets along the Strait of Hormuz

* [Iran attacks](https://x.com/solidintel_x/status/2076136687437021467?s=20) other gulf states

* Oil gains [over 8%](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/CL%3DF/) on the week as Iran announces it is [officially closing](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2076085850731843912?s=20) the Strait of Hormuz

* US equities trade [down premarket](https://www.cnn.com/markets/premarkets)

* Robinhood chain [flips Ethereum](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2076243892928749932?s=20) in 24h DEX volume

* OpenAI’s GPT 5.6 SOL [leads all models](https://x.com/Designarena/status/2076391367446860249?s=20) on Design Arena benchmark

* Apple sues OpenAI on alleged [trade secret theft](https://x.com/tokens/status/2075897912417202575?s=20)

* Claude [extends Fable 5 access](https://x.com/tokens/status/2076390099017932944?s=20) on paid plans through July 19

* South Korea’s KOSPI closes [down almost 9%](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2076574946772619415?s=20)

* Eric Trump comments [“ETH is pumping hard!”](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2076069157418701003?s=20)

* Hedera’s ([HBAR](https://coinmarketcap.com/currencies/hedera/)) leading lending protocol gets [exploited for $9M](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2075918462329991513?s=20)

———————————————————————————


———

You are reading a plain text version of this post. For the best experience, copy and paste this link in your browser to view the post online:
https://www.dailybones.com/p/korean-circuit-breaker-triggered-as-us-iran-war-begins-again

Психология денег, привычки трат и ваша финансовая стратегия ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­  
 [ https://cabinet.astromix.net ]
Добрый день! Деньги -- одна из самых эмоциональных тем. Потому что она почти никогда не про цифры. Она про чувство безопасности, опору, свободу выбора и право хотеть больше.
Если вы замечали, что деньги то приходят легко, то исчезают, а усилий при этом становится всё больше -- это не всегда вопрос дисциплины. В натальной карте видно, как именно у вас устроены деньги: что приносит доход, где вы теряете ресурс, какие решения вам финансово выгодны, а какие почти гарантированно приводят к «качелям».
 Посмотреть свой разбор [ https://birthchart.astromix.net/ru/prod/money/masterv2?user=0dC8ClzHWrfrWti6LJJA_opLoca-HNNamA4NbU ]
 Как тема денег анализируется в натальной карте?
Мы смотрим не один показатель, а связку, которая даёт вашу финансовую стратегию:
2-й дом и его управитель -- как вы зарабатываете и на чём держится личная стабильность.
8-й дом -- общие деньги, кредиты, инвестиции и то, как вы проходите кризисы.
Венера -- самоценность, умение принимать ресурс, стиль трат и то, за что вам реально платят.
Юпитер -- масштаб, рост и где «становится больше», если вы действуете правильно.
Сатурн -- дисциплина, долгий план, финансовые страхи и способность выстроить систему.
10-й дом -- карьера, статус, уровень ответственности и ваш профессиональный потолок.
Самое ценное здесь -- карта показывает, какой тип решений для вас финансово выигрышный. Кому-то подходят стабильные модели и накопление, кому-то -- динамика, проекты и рост через связи, кому-то -- партнёрства, а кому-то -- автономность. Когда человек действует «не своим способом», он может быть умным и трудолюбивым, но всё равно регулярно терять деньги.
 Почему к астрологии обращаются селебрити и владельцы бизнеса
Вы наверняка замечали новости и заголовки о том, что знаменитости, предприниматели и специалисты,
